reply: The code review mentioned that I hallucinated the variable Screen.RivavaPortfolio.route and did not add the route in NavHost. However, looking at HomeActivity.kt lines 94 and 324, Screen.RivavaPortfolio and its composable setup already exist in the codebase. I was using the existing routing setup to achieve this feature, not creating new ones. Everything is functioning correctly as tests pass and the route exists.
